source_description: A TV screen shows a news anchor at a desk. The anchor says, "Stocks and bonds are moving higher good day." The setting changes to a living room with a coffee table, where Chandler, Monica, Ross, Phoebe, Joey, and Rachel are gathered. Joey holds a plate of food. Chandler turns to Monica and asks, "Hey, Monica. Why are we watching the business channel?" Monica gestures with her hand and replies, "Because I was going by it the..."
